description: An augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) app designed for individuals with nonverbal autism, aphasia, stroke, or other speech and language disorders. It utilizes advanced, AI-powered word predictions with next-generation text-to-speech to enable users to quickly build sentences by tapping and have them spoken aloud with natural-sounding voices.
target_audience: Individuals with nonverbal autism, aphasia, stroke, ALS, Parkinson's, cerebral palsy, or other speech and language disorders who need an alternate way of communicating.

description: An app that automatically translates text and audio into American Sign Language (ASL), British Sign Language (BSL), and Brazilian Sign Language (Libras) through a 3D avatar. It acts as a communication aid for quick, basic communication and also helps users learn and practice various sign languages.
target_audience: Deaf and hard of hearing individuals for understanding spoken or written language, individuals learning sign language, and hearing individuals communicating with sign language users.

description: A completely free, non-profit application that translates American Sign Language (ASL) alphabets, and in future updates common words and phrases, into text and speech in real-time using the device's built-in camera. It operates fully offline and prioritizes user privacy by running all machine learning models on the device.
target_audience: Individuals who use American Sign Language to communicate, enabling them to express themselves to hearing individuals via text or spoken words.

description: An AI-powered app offering two-way translation: English text or speech to Sign Language via visual signs, and Sign Language recognition from a device's camera to English text and speech. It also includes a comprehensive sign language dictionary with video tutorials.
target_audience: Deaf and hard of hearing individuals for translating their signs into English, hearing individuals for translating English into signs, and anyone looking to learn or practice sign language.

description: An automatic Sign Language Interpretation platform that translates sign language gestures to text and speech in real-time. It is device-agnostic, working on various devices with a browser and camera, and offers features like a personal assistant providing answers in sign language and interpreting TV content.
target_audience: Deaf, hard-of-hearing, and speech-impaired individuals who use sign language, to facilitate independent communication with hearing individuals and access information.
